commit.message:
Fix toolbar About button not appearing

AddAction's 4th arg is toolTipText (invisible), 5th is the visible
text label. "About" was only passed as the tooltip so the button
rendered with no icon and no text. Pass it for both args.

commit.message:
Add toolbar with About button to all windows; add About window

Each window now has a BToolBar at the top containing an About button.
Clicking it sends B_ABOUT_REQUESTED to be_app, which shows a
BAboutWindow with app description and copyright via AboutRequested().

Build now links against -lshared and includes private Haiku headers
for BToolBar and BAboutWindow.

Switch from @tailwindcss/vite to @tailwindcss/postcss

The Vite plugin has a code point hashing bug on Linux (Vercel builds).
PostCSS plugin uses a different compilation path that avoids this.

fix(skillset): fetch member list from manifest when not inline in index

Registries can store skillset members in a separate manifest.json file
at .amaru_registry/skillsets/<name>/manifest.json instead of inline in
the index. The add and update commands now fetch this manifest when the
index entry has no items array.

type to parse the filesystem-based format (skills/commands/agents arrays).

Fix apply changes and add event links

- Add View Event link in pending changes section
- Add View Event link in View Changes modal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Production hardening: retries, timeouts, perf logging, and reliability fixes (#19)

- Dockerfile: add PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 for immediate Cloud Run log output
- deploy.sh: min-instances=1 + no-cpu-throttling for faster cold starts
- chat_service.py: connection pooling (singleton session), retry with backoff on send failures
- gemini_service.py: enforce per-tier timeouts via ThreadPoolExecutor, structured timeout fallback
- gmail_service.py: thread-safe Gmail service per worker thread
- briefing.py: substantive notes check (min 50 words) to prevent partial/in-progress debriefs, increased min wait to 15 min
- config.py: add MEETING_DEBRIEF_MIN_NOTE_WORDS, bump min wait to 15 min
- main.py: performance logging throughout message pipeline (conversation, context, gemini, send), timed source fetches
- tasks_service.py: parallel fetch of completed tasks across task lists

commit.message:
ODIN-102: Incorporate multi-LLM review findings into chart components concept

Addresses 9 critical findings from ChatGPT and Gemini reviews:
- Single SSE ownership (useChartLiveUpdates is SSE-agnostic)
- chartEpoch concept for reconnect/day-change gating
- rAF batch cap (max 50/frame) + per-frame coalescing
- Chart-Feed linking (click-to-jump with crosshair navigation)
- DecisionFeed virtualization (react-window) + auto-scroll freeze
- Day-change UX: rolling context (30 bars) instead of hard reset
- Indicator lag on live tick documented as intentional design decision
- Timezone handling: exchange-TZ mandatory in chart timeScale
- Memory policy unified: 1000 events across all stores

Also adds implementation protocol documenting the review process.

Fix IG session expiry during scoring: reconnect cooldown + direct REST

  REST API for historical prices (pandas 2.2 incompatibility)

  creation requests (was doing ~90 reconnects per scoring cycle)

  auth errors instead of wasting API budget on a dead session

commit.message:
Add complete Realtor AI Assistant scaffold with all 8 modules

Production-quality Python scaffold with:
- Telegram bot with /start, /status, /deal commands and inline keyboards
- 7 AM morning briefing with Approve/Edit/Skip per action item
- Module 1: Off-Market Lead Scout (tax delinquency, pre-foreclosure, probate, FSBO)
- Module 2: Facebook Social Listener (trigger phrase detection via Playwright)
- Module 3: Brand Engine (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun content calendar)
- Module 4: Market Analysis (ATTOM, FRED, TAMU sourced reports)
- Module 5: Reputation Monitor (Google, Zillow, Realtor.com reviews)
- Module 6: Success Story & Referral Engine (multi-platform content)
- Module 7: SOI Nurture System (anniversaries, seasonal, Lob direct mail)
- Module 8: Transaction Monitor (7d/3d/1d deadline alerts)
- Claude client wrapper with real estate system prompt
- Firestore storage with address+signal deduplication
- APScheduler with hourly/daily/weekly/monthly jobs
- Motivated seller scoring algorithm (signal weight + recency + equity + contact)

commit.message:
Light mode visual depth & polish — three-layer z-axis system

Upgrade light mode from flat defaults to intentional design with visible
card elevation, stronger borders, saturated accents, and recessed form
controls. Dark mode stays exactly as-is via dark: overrides throughout.

Foundation: darken --background/--border/--muted/--muted-foreground CSS
vars, upgrade shadow-card/shadow-elegant to 3-layer shadows, add inset
shadows on inputs/selects/textareas, fix panel-highlight for light mode.

Primitives: Card border/shadow, Badge fills, Button outline/flat depth,
Tab active shadow, TableHead background tint.

Components: Dashboard accordion triggers, metric ring halos, sales cards,
StatOrb, leaderboard panels, LQS tiles/bucket selector, planner panels.

Fixes: Renewals amber warning text unreadable in light mode (amber-400 →
amber-700 with dark: fallback), Challenge hero text using theme-aware
text-foreground on hardcoded dark background (→ text-white/text-slate-300).

commit.message:
feat(phase7.5): Wave 6 -- Audio & Video (v0.14.0)

Add 5 multimedia modules (~14,000 lines, 213 tests):

- ALSA-Compatible API (alsa.rs, ~2,610 lines, 47 tests): PCM device
  lifecycle with 7-state machine, hardware/software params, ring buffer
  read/write + MMAP, mixer controls (volume/switch), sample format
  conversion (U8/S16/S32), 16.16 fixed-point gain with dB lookup,
  capture pipeline with overrun detection, device registry
- USB Audio + HDMI (usb_audio.rs, ~2,680 lines, 41 tests): UAC 1.0/2.0
  descriptor parsing, isochronous endpoint sync, 8.8 dB volume control,
  HDMI CEA-861 infoframe, ACR N/CTS, ELD sink capabilities
- Audio Codecs (codecs.rs, ~3,320 lines, 40 tests): OGG container with
  CRC32, Vorbis decoder (codebook Huffman, Floor1, Residue, integer
  MDCT 2.30 fixed-point), MP3 decoder (Layer III Huffman, integer
  requantization, IMDCT, 32-subband polyphase filterbank)
- Image Codecs (image_codecs.rs, ~2,970 lines, 41 tests): PNG (DEFLATE,
  5 filters, Adam7, all color types), JPEG (baseline DCT, integer IDCT,
  YCbCr fixed-point, chroma subsampling), GIF (LZW, animation, disposal)
- Video Processing (video_processing.rs, ~2,440 lines, 44 tests): AVI
  container (RIFF, frame extraction, interleaved demux), frame rate
  conversion (5 modes incl 3:2 pulldown), SRT subtitle overlay with
  font rendering, real-time audio scheduling (3 priority classes)

All 4 clippy targets clean (0 warnings). All 3 architectures build.
Phase 7.5 progress: 49/80 items (61%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs(runtime): sync all docs with implementation, add SDK encoding helpers (#20)

Update stale documentation across 6 files to match current code:
- CLAUDE.md: update phase status, packages, CLI flags, SDK description
- IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md: fix version byte, header size, authority/lineage status, file reference
- DEVELOPMENT.md: Go 1.22→1.25, cyclomatic max 15→20, add 12 missing packages to project structure
- ARCHITECTURE.md: fix capability table status, header size, cost formula (Nanoseconds), byte layout
- AGENT_LIFECYCLE.md: 4→5 exports, Tick() returns bool, cost formula, checkpoint format v0x04
- IMPROVEMENTS.md: mark all 10 items DONE with implementation details

Add SDK encoding helpers for fixed-size fields:
- Encoder.Raw(b) appends bytes without length prefix
- Decoder.FixedBytes(n) reads exactly n bytes into new slice
- Decoder.ReadInto(dst) reads len(dst) bytes into existing slice
- 7 new tests covering round-trips, short reads, and size comparison
